abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Reborn in Blood
abilities.text: At the start of the battle round, when you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, if this model is destroyed, you can use a triple 6 from that roll to use this ability instead of activating any Blessings of Khorne at the start of that battle round. If you do, this model is no longer destroyed and in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, it is set up anywhere on the battlefield using its Deep Strike ability, with 8 wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Wrathful Presence
abilities.text: At the start of the battle round, select one Wrathful Presence ability. Until the start of the next battle round, this model has that ability.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Scuttling Gait
abilities.text: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Brass Stampede
abilities.text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Instrument of Chaos
abilities.text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Daemonic Icon
abilities.text: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

abilities.name: Aura of Dark Glory
abilities.text: Models in this unit have an invulnerable save characteristic of 5+.

abilities.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Jakhals**^^

abilities.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Goremongers**^^

abilities.name: Bellowed Challenge
abilities.text: Melee weapons (excluding Devastating Wounds weapons) equipped by models in this unit gain the [^^ANTI-MONSTER^^ 3+] and [^^ANTI-VEHICLE^^ 3+] abilities.

abilities.name: Forwards, for Blood
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit and each time that unit makes a Blood Surge move, you can re-roll the D6 used to determine how far models in that unit move.

abilities.name: Lord of Slaughter
abilities.text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Strategem for 0CP, even if a different unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Murderous Insight
abilities.text: Each time an attack made by this unit destroys an enemy unit, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Rage Eternal
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return one destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Bane of Cowards
abilities.text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abilities.text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

abilities.text: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

abilities.text: While a friendly ^^Blood Legions^^ unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Relentless Carnage
abilities.text: At the end of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll eight D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Assault Ramp
abilities.text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Blood-hungry Annihilator
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** target within 18", you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Punishing Suppression
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^*). Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Meet Any Challenge
abilities.text: In your opponent's Movement phase, each time an enemy unit is set up or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, any units embarked within it can disembark.

abilities.name: To Slake Its Rage
abilities.text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: Model in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Bloody Fury
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll. Each time this unit declares a charge that targets the closest enemy unit, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-10 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Aerial Assault
abilities.text: Each time a unit with the Deep Strike ability disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Thunderhawk cluster bombs

abilities.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**World Eaters Infantry**^^ units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Devastating Assault
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, its hellforged weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abilities.name: Direct the Slaughter
abilities.text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly ^^**World Eaters^^** unit within 12" of this model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Scuttling Walker

abilities.name: Unleash Wrath
abilities.text:
At the end of your opponent's Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit that was set up on the battlefield within 12" of this model; this model can then either:
- Shoot at that unit, but only if it is an eligible target.
- Declare a charge against that unit (note that even if this charge is successful, this model does not receive any Charge bonus this turn).

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Brazen Fury
abilities.text: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Brazen Fury move. To do so, roll one D6: models in this unit move a number of inches up to the result of this roll, but this unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding ^^**Aircraft^^**). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Brazen Fury move while Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Brazen Fury move per phase.

abilities.name: Rend and Tear
abilities.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets a ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** unit, until the end of the phase, improve the Damage characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Brazen Fury

When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Brazen Fury move while Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Brazen Fury move per phase.

abilities.text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [^^Assault^^] ability

abilities.name: Malefic Deceit
abilities.text: Each time an attack is made against this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Rider of the Immaterial Winds
abilities.text: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if this model's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Objective Ravaged
abilities.text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

abilities.name: Icon of Khorne
abilities.text: If the bearer's unit contains 1 or more Icons of Khorne, each time the bearer's unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain one Bloodshed point. Each time you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, roll one additional D6 for each Bloodshed point you have, after which, all your Bloodshed points are lost.

abilities.name: Legendary Killer
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: The Betrayer
abilities.text: At the end of your Charge phase, if this model is leading a unit and that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you must take a Leadership test for this model. If that test is failed, one Bodyguard model of your choice in that unit is destroyed.

abilities.name: Berserker Frenzy
abilities.text: The first time this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Khorne Berzerkers^^**

abilities.name: Blood Surge
abilities.text: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Blood Surge move. To do so, roll one D6 and add 2 to the roll: models in this unit move a number of inches up to this result, but this unit must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding ^^**Aircraft^^**). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Blood Surge move while it is Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Blood Surge move per phase.

abilities.name: Icon of Khorne
abilities.text: If the bearer's unit contains 1 or more Icons of Khorne, each time the bearer's unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain one Bloodshed point. Each time you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, roll one additional D6 for each Bloodshed point you have, after which, all your Bloodshed points are lost.

abilities.name: Idol of Blessed Blood
abilities.text: At the start of the battle round, if this unit is on the battlefield, when you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, roll one additional D6.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-8 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Line-breaker
abilities.text: When making ranged attacks, this model can target enemy units within Engagement Range of it with Blast weapons (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, when making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-8 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Bloodlust
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, its melee weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. In addition, once per battle, this model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Assault Ramp
abilities.text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Assault Ramp
abilities.text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Explorator Augury Web
abilities.text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer, but the bearer must halve its Transport Capacity.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Duty Eternal
abilities.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Eightbound^^**, ^^**Exalted Eightbound^^**, ^^**Khorne Berzerkers^^**

abilities.name: Fire Riders
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability and each time a model in that unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally through models and terrain features. When making a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, models in that unit can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abilities.name: Bloody Stampede
abilities.text: Each time this model's unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model, then roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Aggressive Advance
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a Move characteristic of 10" and each time a model in that unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally though terrain features.

abilities.name: Crush All Who Stand Before Us
abilities.text: Each time this model's unit is selected to fight, you can use this ability. When determining which models in this unit are eligible to fight, any models in it that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Eightbound^^**, ^^**Exalted Eightbound^^**, ^^**Khorne Berzerkers^^**

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Khorne Berzerkers^^**

abilities.name: A Worthy Skull
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a ^^**Character^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model's unit destroys a ^^**Character^^** model, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Forwards, For Blood!
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit and each time that unit makes a Blood Surge move, you can re-roll the D6 used to determine how far models in that unit move.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-10 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 6 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Inviolable Transport
abilities.text: Once per battle round, when an attack is allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abilities.name: The Scent of Blood
abilities.text: Each time this model declares a charge that targets one or more units below Starting Strength, add 1 to the Charge roll. If one or more of the targets of that charge are Below Half-strength, add 2 to the Charge roll instead.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Savage Exaltation
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll and, if that attack targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Powerful Volley
abilities.text: Each time this model shoots in your Shooting phase, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, all [HEAVY] weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Even In Death I Serve
abilities.text: The first time this model is destroyed, remove it from play without resolving its Deadly Demise ability. Then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Armoured Spearhead
abilities.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and, if that unit is within range of an objective marker you do not control, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Rotating Death
abilities.text: This model’s Punisher rotary cannon has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability when targeting INFANTRY units.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Ferocious Assault
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Rage Embodied (Aura)
abilities.text: While a friendly ^^Blood Legions^^ unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

abilities.name: Murderlust
abilities.text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-7 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s Slaughter and Carnage.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.text: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Rage Eternal
abilities.text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return one destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

abilities.name: Possessed Lord
abilities.text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and those weapons have the [Devastating Wounds] ability.

abilities.name: Lord of the Eightbound
abilities.text: If this model is attached to a ^^**World Eaters Possessed^^** unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, this model has the Deep Strike and Scouts 6" abilities.

abilities.text: While this model has 1-13 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Aerial Assault

abilities.text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abilities.name: Armoured Resilience
abilities.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Termite Assault
abilities.text: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model can disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and if they do they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Sunderer of Fortresses
abilities.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a VEHICLE, improve the Strength and Damage characteristic of that attack by 1 (if that attack targets a FORTIFICATION unit, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 2 instead).

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-6 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Pinning Bombardment
abilities.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its Scorpius multi-launcher scored a hit against an enemy INFANTRY unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Interceptor
abilities.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-4 wounds remaining
abilities.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
